title: hieracium cordatum subsp. leptocoleum
intro: Hieracium cordatum subsp. leptocoleum is a lesser-known plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly found in mountainous regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium cordatum subsp. leptocoleum include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
